payload.answer: Proposal rejected due to lack of granularity and high noise-to-signal ratio.
payload.reason: Storing an entire 8000-word transcript in a single summary card violates durability principles. It lacks atomicity, reduces retrieval efficiency, and conflates raw data logs with actionable memory. Durable memory requires granular, structured, and high-signal content.

raw_text:
{
  "durable": false,
  "decision": "do_not_store",
  "reason": "Storing an entire 8000-word transcript in a single summary card violates durability principles. It lacks atomicity, reduces retrieval efficiency, and conflates raw data logs with actionable memory. Durable memory requires granular, structured, and high-signal content.",
  "answer": "Proposal rejected due to lack of granularity and high noise-to-signal ratio.",
